overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2028 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2028. The fund will terminate in December 2028. IBHH was launched on Mar 8, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2028 Term High Yield and Income Index
